data: {"generalSituation":"The northeast monsoon will bring slightly cooler weather to Guangdong tomorrow. A band of clouds will cover the coastal areas in the following couple of days. A trough of low pressure is expected to affect southern China early next week. There will be showers and a few thunderstorms over the region. A fresh easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260430","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"North to northeast force 4. occasionally force 5.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
